name: classify_inbound_risk_benign_chat
message: hello, what is the weather today?
description: Benign chat: classifier produces NONE/unknown/no-confirm. With trust mode active (identity/POLICIES.yaml default), should_skip_risk_gate short-circuits via check_trust_mode_skip and returns label='skip', reason='trust_mode'. Pinning this outcome end-to-end catches drift in either the classifier defaults or the trust-mode skip logic.
